name: How to Set Buckwheat
recipeIngredient: 1 cup (or 4 oz) witch yeast or 1 cake yeast that has been soaked
recipeInstructions:
1. In the evening, combine the lukewarm water and sweet milk in a crock.
2. Add the salt to the mixture.
3. Mix in the witch yeast or soaked cake yeast.
4. Gradually add the buckwheat and wheat flours while stirring continuously.
5. Stir in a pinch of soda and half a cup of buttermilk in the morning.
6. At night, add enough water to achieve the desired consistency, then thicken and allow it to stand overnight.
7. The next morning, thin the mixture as before. These cakes are very good.
